'''ronazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yardlike|yardlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yardlike|yardlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ronazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronazithi|ronazithi]] || [[word:ronaziji|ronaziji]] || [[word:ronazishi|ronazishi]] || [[word:ronaziki|ronaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronazuthuthu|ronazuthuthu]] || [[word:ronazujuju|ronazujuju]] || [[word:ronazushushu|ronazushushu]] || [[word:ronazukuku|ronazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronazuthu|ronazuthu]] || [[word:ronazuju|ronazuju]] || [[word:ronazushu|ronazushu]] || [[word:ronazuku|ronazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronazufthuf|ronazufthuf]] || [[word:ronazufjuf|ronazufjuf]] || [[word:ronazufshuf|ronazufshuf]] || [[word:ronazufkuf|ronazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronazethe|ronazethe]] || [[word:ronazeje|ronazeje]] || [[word:ronazeshe|ronazeshe]] || [[word:ronazeke|ronazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronazothotho|ronazothotho]] || [[word:ronazojojo|ronazojojo]] || [[word:ronazoshosho|ronazoshosho]] || [[word:ronazokoko|ronazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronazotho|ronazotho]] || [[word:ronazojo|ronazojo]] || [[word:ronazosho|ronazosho]] || [[word:ronazoko|ronazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronazofthof|ronazofthof]] || [[word:ronazofjof|ronazofjof]] || [[word:ronazofshof|ronazofshof]] || [[word:ronazofkof|ronazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfthÃŸf|ronazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfjÃŸf|ronazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfshÃŸf|ronazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfkÃŸf|ronazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|ronazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|ronazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|ronazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|ronazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfthÃŸf|ronazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfjÃŸf|ronazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfshÃŸf|ronazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfkÃŸf|ronazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfthÃŸf|ronazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfjÃŸf|ronazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfshÃŸf|ronazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ronazÃŸfkÃŸf|ronazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ronazÃḊthÃḊ|ronazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:ronazÃḊjÃḊ|ronazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:ronazÃḊshÃḊ|ronazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:ronazÃḊkÃḊ|ronazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ronazathatha|ronazathatha]] || [[word:ronazajaja|ronazajaja]] || [[word:ronazashasha|ronazashasha]] || [[word:ronazakaka|ronazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ronazatha|ronazatha]] || [[word:ronazaja|ronazaja]] || [[word:ronazasha|ronazasha]] || [[word:ronazaka|ronazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ronazafthaf|ronazafthaf]] || [[word:ronazafjaf|ronazafjaf]] || [[word:ronazafshaf|ronazafshaf]] || [[word:ronazafkaf|ronazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ronazasha|ronazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronazshÃḋsha|ronazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronazrosha|ronazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronazmusha|ronazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronazyasha|ronazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronaznkshÃḋsha|goronaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronaznkrosha|goronaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronaznkmusha|goronaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronaznkyasha|goronaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ronanazasha|ronanazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronanazshÃḋsha|ronanazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronanazrosha|ronanazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronanazmusha|ronanazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronanazyasha|ronanazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronanaznkshÃḋsha|goronanaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronanaznkrosha|goronanaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronanaznkmusha|goronanaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronanaznkyasha|goronanaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:renÃḊzasha|renÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:renÃḊzshÃḋsha|renÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:renÃḊzrosha|renÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:renÃḊzmusha|renÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:renÃḊzyasha|renÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorenÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gorenÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorenÃḊznkrosha|gorenÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorenÃḊznkmusha|gorenÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorenÃḊznkyasha|gorenÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ronfazasha|ronfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ronfazshÃḋsha|ronfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ronfazrosha|ronfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ronfazmusha|ronfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ronfazyasha|ronfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goronfaznkshÃḋsha|goronfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goronfaznkrosha|goronfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goronfaznkmusha|goronfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goronfaznkyasha|goronfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
